data.title: Market News: Trump Media and Technology Group registers application for Bitcoin investment with the US SEC

data.title: Polkadot Eyes Bitcoin Reserve Plan Using 501K DOT in Yearlong tBTC Strategy
data.description:
The Polkadot community members have proposed a strategic initiative to create a Bitcoin reserve using the network’s treasury funds. The plan suggests converting 501,000 DOT into tBTC over one year through an automated dollar-cost averaging system. More so, the accumulated tBTC would be deployed in DeFi liquidity pools using a non-custodial bridge
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/polkadot-eyes-bitcoin-reserve-plan-using-501k-dot-in-yearlong-tbtc-strategy/

data.title: Charles Hoskinson Eyes $100M Treasury Shift – Will Stablecoins Rescue Cardano’s TVL?
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson has detailed a proposal to convert $100M of ADA from the Cardano treasury into stablecoins and Bitcoin, saying added liquidity could draw broader DeFi use. He has proposed a sovereign-style fund with an elected board and regulated asset-manager partnerships.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/charles-hoskinson-eyes-100m-treasury-shift-will-stablecoins-rescue-cardanos-tvl/

data.title: Donald Trump Pledges ‘Clear, Simple’ Onchain Rules Before Imminent GENIUS Act Vote
data.description:
Donald Trump has vowed to make America the “crypto capital,” criticizing Biden’s approach and listing measures such as ending Operation Chokepoint 2. 0, creating a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and backing the GENIUS Act, which faces a Senate vote on June 17 amid questions over his stablecoin links.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/donald-trump-day-one-crypto-reset-genius-act-vote/

data.description:

data.title: There Is No ‘Easy Road’ For Regulation Despite CFTC’s Pro-Growth Stance, Commissioner Caroline Pham Says
data.description:
Caroline Pham has clarified that the CFTC’s support for innovation does not weaken enforcement, warning crypto firms that fraud and theft will face prosecution. Her comments have come as four commissioners prepare to leave and Brian Quintenz awaits confirmation under the Trump administration.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/there-is-no-easy-road-for-regulation-despite-cftcs-pro-growth-stance-commissioner-caroline-pham-says/
